feed.title: bankruptcymeanstest.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Bankruptcy Means Test by State: 2026 Income Limits and Eligibility
entry.summary: Pass the bankruptcy means test? Use our free calculator to check Chapter 7 eligibility based on your income and expenses. Updated for 2026 figures.

entry.title: Chapter 7 Means Test Alabama: Income Limits and Calculator [2026]
